scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Dartmouth reviews curriculum in the context of what is available at a student’s school and says its applicants typically pursue the most rigorous coursework available, especially in their areas of greatest interest.
areas.detail: Dartmouth reviews curriculum in the context of what is available at a student’s school and says its applicants typically pursue the most rigorous coursework available, especially in their areas of greatest interest.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: For first-year applicants, Dartmouth requires a counselor evaluation and two teacher recommendations, and it strongly encourages a peer recommendation.
areas.detail: For first-year applicants, Dartmouth requires a counselor evaluation and two teacher recommendations, and it strongly encourages a peer recommendation.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Dartmouth requires a writing supplement with Dartmouth-specific short essay prompts, including a 100-word response required of all applicants.
areas.detail: Dartmouth requires a writing supplement with Dartmouth-specific short essay prompts, including a 100-word response required of all applicants.
